tagline: Michoacán-style birria, simmered slow on Laurel Canyon.

hero.heading: Birria, the way Michoacán means it.
hero.subheading: Goat, beef shoulder, hours of low simmer in adobo. Served with consomé hot enough to fog your glasses. The Pacoima birrieria 591 reviews keep coming back to.

about.heading: A recipe carried from Apatzingán.
paragraphs: Apatzingán, Michoacán is where birria was born — slow-simmered goat, dried chiles, the kind of adobo that takes a full day to come into itself. We carried that recipe here in 2003, and it hasn't changed a thing.

Every morning the cazos go on at sunrise. By noon the consomé is deep, dark, and unmistakably alive. Pull a tortilla through it before your first bite. That's how birria's been done for a hundred years.

services.title: Birria de chivo (goat)
services.description: Slow-simmered goat in dried-chile adobo. Served with consomé, fresh tortillas, lime, cilantro, white onion.

services.title: Birria de res (beef)
services.description: Beef shoulder, same dried-chile bath, same patience. Richer, deeper, equally Michoacán.

services.title: Quesabirria tacos
services.description: Tortilla dipped in birria fat, melted oaxaca cheese, tender meat. Crispy edges. Three to an order.

services.title: Birria ramen
services.description: Our consomé, ramen noodles, generous birria, cilantro and onion on top. The crossover dish that surprised everyone.

services.title: Mariachi platter
services.description: Half goat, half beef, rice, beans, consomé bowl, six tortillas. Feeds two — or one with intent.

services.title: Mexican beverages
services.description: Horchata, Mexican Coke, jamaica, tamarindo. The right thing to drink with birria.

reviews.name: Esteban L.
reviews.text: If you grew up eating birria, this is THE birria. The consomé alone is worth the drive. Michoacán flavors, hands down.

reviews.name: Yvonne G.
reviews.text: Quesabirria here is the best in the Valley. Crispy edges, oozing cheese, broth for dipping. I dream about it.

reviews.name: Ricardo M.
reviews.text: My family is from Apatzingán. This place is the real thing. The owners welcome you like family.

contact.mapEmbedQuery: Birrieria Apatzingan 10040 Laurel Canyon Blvd Pacoima CA

seo.title: Birrieria Apatzingan — Pacoima · Michoacán-Style Birria
seo.description: Pacoima's authentic Michoacán-style birria. Slow-simmered goat & beef, quesabirria, birria ramen on Laurel Canyon Blvd. 4.4★ · 591 reviews.
